basic_details.job_title: Cordite Factory Aruvankadu Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Cordite Factory Aruvankadu Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website munitionsindia.in. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the Cordite Factory Aruvankadu Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 60 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 05 Years (only for reserved posts), OBC-NCL: 03 Years (only for reserved posts), Ex-Servicemen: Period of Military Service + 03 Years.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in any discipline, MBA / PG Diploma in relevant field (HR / Finance / Material Management / Logistics & Supply Chain / Operations), CA (Inter) / CMA (Inter) for FIN post
qualification.details: Project Assistant (HR): Bachelor’s degree in any discipline with MBA / PG Diploma in HR Management / Personnel Management / Industrial Relations. Desirable: Experience of working in SAP. Project Assistant (FIN): Bachelor’s degree in Commerce/Finance/Accounting/Economics with MBA (Finance) or equivalent or CA (Inter) / CMA (Inter). Desirable: Experience of working in SAP. Project Assistant (MM): Bachelor’s degree in any discipline with MBA / PG Diploma in Material Management / Logistics & Supply Chain Management / Operations Management. Desirable: Experience of working in SAP.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25000 to Rs. 36602 + IDA (depending on experience) Per Month.

selection_process: Interview / Interaction Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Project Assistant posts at Cordite Factory Aruvankadu is 16-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies available for the Project Assistant posts at Cordite Factory Aruvankadu.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Project Assistant (FIN)?
faq.answer: For Project Assistant (FIN), a Bachelor’s degree in Commerce/Finance/Accounting/Economics with MBA (Finance) or equivalent or CA (Inter) / CMA (Inter) is required.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Assistant posts is 60 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 25000 to Rs. 36602 per month, plus IDA, depending on experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Interview/Interaction, Document Verification, and the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions, so candidates from other states may be eligible if they meet the other criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Project Assistant positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Project Assistant positions is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Cordite Factory Aruvankadu, as mentioned in the Important Links section.
